description:
Persona's webhooks are the authoritative signal for Inquiry status changes. Receive, verify, persist.

**Scope**
- Drizzle schema: `src/lib/db/schema/kyc_verifications.ts` — `id`, `user_id`, `vendor`, `vendor_reference_id`, `status` (`pending`/`approved`/`declined`/`needs_review`/`expired`), `verified_at`, `expires_at`, `raw_payload_s3_key`, `created_at`, `updated_at`.
- Route handler `src/app/api/webhooks/persona/route.ts` → calls `enqueueWebhook('persona', event)` from the infrastructure plumbing (T-045) after verifying Persona's signature (HMAC-SHA256).
- Worker handler `workers/src/handlers/persona.ts`:
  - Handles `inquiry.approved`, `inquiry.declined`, `inquiry.needs-review`, `inquiry.expired`.
  - Idempotent — re-applying the same event is a no-op (compare `updated_at` vs. event timestamp).
  - Writes the raw payload reference to `raw_payload_s3_key` (encrypted via the infra S3 bucket).
- Audit log entry on every status change.

**Acceptance**
- Replay-fixture test: known-good Persona payloads update the row correctly; replay produces no second effect.
- Invalid signature → 400, audit row, alarm.
title: Persona webhook receiver + kyc_verifications schema
